programme.title: Friends in Deadly Places
programme.desc: Maggie is a teen who's happy to make a new friend, until she realizes she's being groomed for something much worse. AKA My Best Friend's Secret

programme.title: Hooligan Legacy
programme.desc: Relentless. Gritty. Brutal. A visceral story of football, betrayal and revenge. Four men execute a daring football stadium robbery, but the volatile dynamic soon turns sour, landing the villainous leader of the pack in jail. Now he is back on the streets and will stop at nothing to take his revenge.

programme.title: Bridal Boot Camp
programme.desc: Andy Phillips is preparing for her upcoming wedding with her fiancé, Jordan. However, after chatting with her best friend, Andy starts to question if she has what it takes to make a strong and lasting marriage.

programme.title: Wedding Bells
programme.desc: Two people with commitment issues are asked to be best man and maid of honour at their friends' wedding. With nothing much in common, they didn't expect to find the romance of a life time.

programme.title: A Wedding to Remember
programme.desc: On opposite sides of a development project, Olivia and Brian are surprised to find they are the Maid of Honor and Best Man at the same wedding. They have to put their feelings aside to save their best friends’ wedding... which may turn out to be their own as well.

programme.title: Adventures of Huckleberry Finn
programme.desc: Huckleberry Finn, a rambunctious boy adventurer chafing under the bonds of civilization, escapes his humdrum world and his selfish, plotting father by sailing a raft down the Mississippi River.

programme.title: Dying for the Crown
programme.desc: Isabelle attends her 20th high school reunion only to come face to face with Andrea, a former classmate who attacked Isabelle in a jealous craze when she was named Prom Queen. But now Andrea appears to be a changed woman who proves helpful to Isabelle’s business and bonds with Isabelle’s daughter. But the 'The New' Andrea proves to be just a ruse — she’s just waiting for the right time to launch her plan of revenge and destroy Isabelle’s entire world!

programme.title: Secrets at the Lake
programme.desc: While on vacation, a happy-go-lucky family becomes the unsuspecting target of a grieving mother embroiled in the mystery surrounding her family's tragic death after a group of teens make a pact to keep what happened secret.

programme.title: The Assassination Bureau
programme.desc: A female journalist commissions the assassination of the chairman of an organization of assassins.

programme.title: Jamaica Inn
programme.desc: In Cornwall, 1819, a young woman discovers she's living near a gang of criminals who arrange shipwrecks for profit.

programme.title: Strangerland
programme.desc: A family finds their dull life in a rural outback town rocked after their two teenage children disappear into the desert, sparking disturbing rumours of their past.

programme.title: The Killer Inside Me
programme.desc: Lou is a handsome, charming, unassuming small town deputy sheriff but he's got a bunch of problems - woman trouble, law-enforcement issues and a growing pile of murder victims.
